Get involved

There's a place for you in this story.

Every leader RECI raises is raised by a community. Whether you give, guide, or grow with us — choose how you'll help write the next chapter.

Sponsor an Outreach

Fund outreach programs, learning materials and mentorship support for children in underserved communities.

Sponsor now

Volunteer

Give your time and skills to programs, events and community outreach. Every hand makes the work lighter.

Volunteer with us

Become a Mentor

Be the role model who helps a young person see — and reach for — their full potential.

Mentor a child

Partner with RECI

Schools, foundations and companies — let's combine strengths and scale impact together.

Start a partnership
Join the movement

Tell us how you'd like to help

Share a few details and our team will reach out within two working days to find the right way for you to get involved.

Prefer to talk?Reach our team
